'''mamate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:glacioeustatically|glacioeustatically]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| m-m-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:glacioeustatically|glacioeustatically]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| mamate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:mamate|mamate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mamatesher|mamatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mamatesherĂ«m|mamatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mamatero|mamatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mamateshĂ«|mamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mamateshĂ«m|mamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimamatero|gokimamatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimamateshĂ«|gokimamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimamateshĂ«m|gokimamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomamankerom|gomamankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomamankeshĂ«|gomamankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomamankeshĂ«m|gomamankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomamankeya|gomamankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mamaterom|mamaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mamatemu|mamatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mamateya|mamateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimamaterom|gokimamaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimamatemu|gokimamatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimamateya|gokimamateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:mamamate|mamamate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mamamatesher|mamamatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mamamatesherĂ«m|mamamatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mamamatero|mamamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mamamateshĂ«|mamamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mamamateshĂ«m|mamamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimamamatero|gokimamamatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimamamateshĂ«|gokimamamateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimamamateshĂ«m|gokimamamateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomamamankerom|gomamamankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomamamankeshĂ«|gomamamankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomamamankeshĂ«m|gomamamankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomamamankeya|gomamamankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mamamaterom|mamamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mamamatemu|mamamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mamamateya|mamamateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimamamaterom|gokimamamaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimamamatemu|gokimamamatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimamamateya|gokimamamateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:mĂŠmĂŠte|mĂŠmĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mĂŠmĂŠtesher|mĂŠmĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m|mĂŠmĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mĂŠmĂŠtero|mĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|mĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|mĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimĂŠmĂŠtero|gokimĂŠmĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«|gokimĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m|gokimĂŠmĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomĂŠmĂŠnkerom|gomĂŠmĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«|gomĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gomĂŠmĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomĂŠmĂŠnkeya|gomĂŠmĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mĂŠmĂŠterom|mĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mĂŠmĂŠtemu|mĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mĂŠmĂŠteya|mĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimĂŠmĂŠterom|gokimĂŠmĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimĂŠmĂŠtemu|gokimĂŠmĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimĂŠmĂŠteya|gokimĂŠmĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:mafmafte|mafmafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:mafmaftesher|mafmaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafmaftesherĂ«m|mafmaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mafmaftero|mafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:mafmafteshĂ«|mafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafmafteshĂ«m|mafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimafmaftero|gokimafmaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokimafmafteshĂ«|gokimafmafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafmafteshĂ«m|gokimafmafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gomafmafnkerom|gomafmafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gomafmafnkeshĂ«|gomafmafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gomafmafnkeshĂ«m|gomafmafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gomafmafnkeya|gomafmafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:mafmafterom|mafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:mafmaftemu|mafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:mafmafteya|mafmafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokimafmafterom|gokimafmafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokimafmaftemu|gokimafmaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokimafmafteya|gokimafmafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
